Analysis: Embedded LSTM-DKT solid but needs better capacity-reg balance (higher embed for reps, moderate hidden, stronger d/wd/clip) to raise val peak and close gen gap; full clean rewrite ensures ckpt completeness for predict.py and avoids bugs. Decision: Rewrite all 3 files with complete consistent code (full hparam save, grad clip, robust ES/scheduler no deprecated args, jsonl ONLY, arg parsing, matching inference); new params h=768/l=2/e=256/d=0.5/lr=2e-4/wd=5e-5/epochs=50/es=15/sch=5/batch=64 for improved generalization. Train then submit_eval on best_model.pt.
